top_signals.title: Stocks under pressure as correction fears grow and record rally defies geopolitical turmoil
top_signals.summary: "'The pendulum could swing backwards," analysts said on Tuesday amid mounting warnings that equities could soon change course.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Indian Central Bank Intervenes as Rupee Drops to Record Low
top_signals.summary: India’s central bank intervened to shore up the struggling rupee as elevated oil prices pushed the currency to a record low.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
